result.stdout:
Convert C# Models, ViewModels and DTOs into their TypeScript equivalents

Usage: dotnet cs2ts [command] [options] <Input>

Arguments:
  Input                                             Input file or directory path

Options:
  -o|--output <OUTPUT>                              Output file or directory
                                                    path
  -t|--use-tabs                                     Use tabs for indentation
  -ts|--tab-size <TAB_SIZE>                         Number of spaces per tab
  -se|--skip-export                                 Skip 'export' keyword
  -k|--use-kebab-case                               Use kebab case for output
                                                    file names
  -m|--append-model-suffix                          Append '.model' suffix to
                                                    output file names
  -c|--clear-output-directory                       Clear output directory
  -a|--angular-mode                                 Use Angular style
                                                    conventions
  -p|--partial-override                             Override only part of output
                                                    file between marker comments
  -pc|--preserve-casing                             Don't convert field names to
                                                    camel case
  -pip|--preserve-interface-prefix                  Don't remove interface
                                                    prefixes
  -d|--convert-dates-to <CONVERT_DATES_TO>          Set output type for dates
                                                    Allowed values are: String,
                                                    Date, Union
  -n|--convert-nullables-to <CONVERT_NULLABLES_TO>  Set output type for
                                                    nullables
                                                    Allowed values are: Null,
                                                    Undefined
  -i|--import-generation <IMPORT_GENERATION>        Enable import generation
                                                    Allowed values are: None,
                                                    Simple
  -q|--quotation-mark <QUOTATION_MARK>              Set quotation marks for
                                                    import statements &
                                                    identifiers
                                                    Allowed values are: Double,
                                                    Single
  -anl|--append-new-line                            Append new line to end of
                                                    file (removes TSLint
                                                    warning)
  -?|-h|--help                                      Show help information

Commands:
  init                                              Initialize - create
                                                    configuration file in
                                                    current directory

Run 'dotnet cs2ts [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

staticCommands.description: Convert C# Models, ViewModels and DTOs into their TypeScript equivalents

options.description: Append '.model' suffix to output file names
Append new line to end of file (removes TSLint warning)
Override only part of output file between marker comments
Don't convert field names to camel case
Set quotation marks for import statements & identifiers
Use kebab case for output file names
